characters.name: Ali Cat
characters.description: Ali Catis a character inTop Catcomics. Ali Cat is a chef for the Caliph of Baghdad.  He ran away to America to earn recognition for his cooking talents.

characters.name: Ali Cat
characters.description: Ali Catis a character inTop Catcomics. Ali Cat is a chef for the Caliph of Baghdad.  He ran away to America to earn recognition for his cooking talents.

characters.name: Amy Vandergelt
characters.description: Amy Vandergeltis a character inTop Cat and the Beverly Hills Cats.  She was voiced byLilly Moon. Amy Vandergeltis the sixteen-year-old niece of Ms. Gertrude Vandergelt.  She metOfficer Dibbleandthe gangwhen she was in Beverly Hills. She was her aunt's original heir to the Vandergelt fortune. However, Amy was presumed missing because Snerdly the butler kept her out of sight working at a car wash untilTop Catandthe gangrescued her.

characters.name: Amy Vandergelt

characters.name: Bad Dog
characters.description: Bad Dogis a character in the filmTop Cat Begins. He is voiced by Diedrich Bader. He is one ofMr. Big's henchmen and second in command. He is always with his gang, includingPantherand the other goons. He a green anthropomorphic bull dog with red hair and he always wears a blue jacket. He threatened the orphans that he would burn down the orphanage if they don't steal for him.

characters.name: Bad Dog

characters.name: Benny
characters.description: Benjamin "Benny" Ballis a character inTop Cat.  He was originally voiced byMaurice Gosfield.Avery Schreibervoiced him inTop Cat and the Beverly Hills Cats. Benny the Ballis a rather short and chubby cat with blue fur and a cream-colored muzzle that, unlike the rest of the gang, takes up most of his face. The hollows of his ears, likeSpook, are portrayed. His cheeks hold two strands of fur curved upwards and away from his face. His tail is short and stubby, similar to that of a young kitten's tail. He usually wears a white cardigan, buttoned near the top with a single button. Unlike the other members of the gang, his eyes are two small dots. Benny is a sweet, naive cat. He has kind manners and is willing to help anyone, including strangers. Benny may appear to be simple-minded, but he tends to ask reasonable questions during the gang's erratic endeavors. In "The Maharajah of Pookajee", Benny asksTop Catwhat to do ifthe real maharajaharrives, since the gang had disguised themselves to get into the royal suite of Sherry Plaza. In "The Missing Heir", Benny asks Top Cat what the missing heir looks like, something which T.C. did not take into account initially. Benny also tends to complain at inappropriate times when he is hungry.

characters.name: Brain
characters.description: Brainis a character inTop Cat.  He was voiced byLeo De Lyon. Brain is an orange cat sporting a purple shirt with a black band at the bottom.  He usually has a deadpan or tired expression on his face, with half-lidded eyes and straight, sometimes downturned, lips.  His eyes are occasionally crossed. His muzzle is tan and is much rounder in comparison to the other cats, and he seems to have an overbite.  His cheeks hold three, sometimes four, strands of fur directed downwards.  He is also often slouching. Brain seems rather dim-witted and slow, often not understanding the commands given to him.  In "All That Jazz",Jazzasks Brain whereTop Catis going with his luggage, and Brain answers that he cannot tell him about the diamonds in "Diambodi", revealing the secret T.C. told him not to share.  He also seems to have slurred speech and slowness in speaking.  In "T.C. Minds the Baby", it is implied that he is in charge of the group's money.

characters.name: Chief Thumbton
characters.description: Chief Thumbtonis aTop Catcharacter. He is the Chief of Police, andOfficer Dibble's boss. He is a no-nonsense man and often yells at Dibble whenever he messes up a case or if he has an important assignment. Thecomic bookstories:

characters.name: Choo-Choo
characters.description: Choo-Choo, also known asChooch, is a character inTop Cat. Choo-Choo is a pink cat with a cream-colored muzzle and two strands of fur directed downwards on each cheek. His face is bow-shaped, with the direction of the bow being up. He has a long, bushy tail, the tip of which is either white or black, depending on the material. Chooch is also the same height asTop Cat. He wears a white long-sleeve turtleneck sweater and has angular eyes akin to that of aSiamese cat. Choo-Choo is a flamboyant, sensitive cat with a thick Brooklyn accent. He is a caring individual and, unlikeFancy-Fancy, tends to be rather anxious and insecure when it comes to potential mates. In "Choo-Choo's Romance", he becomes nervous upon flirting withGoldieand asks Top Cat for help. In "Choo-Choo Goes Ga-Ga", Chooch apparently attempts to commit suicide due to having no hope of datingLola Glamour.

characters.name: Cousin Shifty
characters.description: Cousin Shiftyis the identical cousin ofTop Cat. He appears in "Double Trouble", a story in issue 16 of of the CharltonTop Catcomics. Looking virtually identical to Top Cat, he shares his creamy yellow fur color and white muzzle, four whiskers, and long tail. He also dresses like to TC, also wearing a vest and pork pie hat, though brown. He claims that he and TC used to work in a circus together as a two-headed monster. He is a rather shifty cat, a mischievous fellow immediately interested in prankingOfficer Dibblewith TC. Benny claims that Shifty might just be more clever than TC himself. While TC is annoyed by Shifty's presence, Shifty is over-excited and eager to reminisce about the past with TC. He is a rather unfaithful lover, seeing two different girls at the same time while they are unaware. When he asks TC to pretend to impersonate him and take out one of his girlfriends while he takes out the other, he lacks the foresight to realize that he and TC would take the girls out to the same place and thus ruining their ruse.

characters.name: Cousin Wilber
characters.description: Cousin Wilberis a character inTop Catcomics. He isTop Cat's cousin.  He loves to play practical jokes on everyone, never worrying about the consequences.  He is cross-eyed and wears a gray suit with a top hat.

characters.name: Cousin Wilber

characters.name: Crime Boss
characters.description: Crime Bossis a character inTop Cat. He was voiced byJohn Stephenson. At the hotel, the gangster tells him to heist the jewels and scram. He and the gangster knock on the door. They GiveBennyguns.Top Catgets the order wrong then they put their guns on him. He tells him to hand over the rubies. Top Cat gives him some rubies and takes off.

characters.name: Crook
characters.description: Crookis a character inTop Cat.  He was voiced byDon Messick. He first appears disguised as an old lady. He is later followed byOfficer Dibble. When Dibble looks at the door, his true form is revealed. He later puts his suitcase in the captain's cabin. Dibble can't find anyone that look like a counterfeiter. He checks at the purser but he hasn't seen a old lady.Top Catwalks through him. He later picks up his suitcase from the cabin. Dibble talks to the Captain and everyone thinks it his suitcase. Dibble finds out. He is chased by officer dibble and captured.

characters.name: Dollarus
characters.description: Dollarusis aTop Cat comicscharacter. Dollarus is an orange female cat.  A high society girl, she wore a pearl necklace in her only appearance.  She was a one-time girlfriend ofFancy-Fancywhom he befriended shortly after breaking up withFelinaand swearing off high society girls.

characters.name: Ernest Prowler
characters.description: Ernest Prowleris a character inTop Cat.  He was voiced byDon Messick. He is a former police officer and nephew ofthe Sergeant. After Top Cat and the gang accidentally get Dibble relieved of duty, new Police Academy graduate Prowler is put in charge of Dibble's beat. However Prowler is much more strict than Dibble, so T.C. sets a plan in motion to get Dibble back.

characters.name: Ernest Prowler

characters.name: Fancy-Fancy
characters.description: Fancy-Fancy, or simplyFancy, is a character inTop Cat. He was voiced byJohn Stephenson. Fancy is a cat with light brown fur and a peach-colored muzzle. His physical features are similar toSpook, being slightly thicker than the other cats, having strands of fur pointed downwards at his cheeks and an identical tail shape. Akin toChoo-Choo, the tip of his tail is either black or white, depending on the material. He wears a white scarf around his neck, enhancing the sense of elegance upon him. Fancy is a rather charming sweet-talker with a confident demeanor, often seen with ladies throughout the show. In fact, he has the mostromancesof the gang. Much like Spook, he also tends to be quite relaxed, rarely giving a strong reaction to events. Though he loves to spend quality time with his various romances, none of which seem to last particularly long, he is far more dedicated toTop Catand the rest of the gang. On multiple occasions, he abruptly leaves dates when T.C. calls a meeting.

characters.name: Felina
characters.description: Felinais aTop Cat comicscharacter. She is a girlfriend ofFancy-Fancy, but she is a high society cat.  Disgusted that his friends live in an alley, she makes him choose between them and her.  He chooses her, but when her friends insultThe Gangand he defends them, she asks him to leave.

characters.name: Felina
characters.description: Felinais aTop Cat comicscharacter. She is a girlfriend ofFancy-Fancy, but she is a high society cat.  Disgusted that his friends live in an alley, she makes him choose between them and her.  He chooses her, but when her friends insultThe Gangand he defends them, she asks him to leave.

characters.name: Fifi
characters.description: Fifiis a character inTop Cat.  She was voiced byBea Benaderet. She isLola Glamour's maid. Her head is a round shape with almond-shaped eyes, a cream colored muzzle in the shape of a raindrop, and four whiskers. She has three long eyelashes drawn each on her two eyes, and is wearing lipstick as well. Fifi's fur is a burnt orange color, with three black stripes at the top of her head, which could be implying that she may be a tabby. She wears a blue maid's dress, with a white apron and matching hat.

characters.name: Fifi

characters.name: Grandma Cat
characters.description: Grandma Catis a character inTop Catcomics. She is a stereotypical grandmother, with white hair and dowdy clothes.  She will wash your mouth out with soap for telling lies. She isTop Cat's grandmother, and she believes he is a police cat because he told her he was.

characters.name: Griswald (character)
characters.description: Griswald's portrayal in the 2011 movie Griswaldis a character who appears in two episodes, "The Missing Heir" and "Griswald". He was voiced byDon Messick. He returns inTop Cat: The Movienow voiced by Danny Trejo. He spends most of his scenes antagonizing Top Cat and his gang; and makes another memorable appearance inTop Cat: the Movie. He was originally the accomplice in crime to Chutney the Butler, before discovering Chutney's plan on double-crossing him. Afterwards, he is briefly employed by the NYPD as a police dog and partnered up withOfficer Dibble. He is quite a vicious and dedicated dog, but also gullible and noticeably dim-witted. Griswald doesn't take kindly to others trying to pull the wool over his eyes - be it being lied to, tricked, or otherwise double-crossed. He is very literal-minded and will often dedicate himself to any goal he has at the moment with much gusto. He is, however, prone to slipping up and focusing on something else - such as when he was so bothered byBenny the Ball's piano playing that he derailed one of Chutney's plans just to correct Benny. In the film, he is convinced by Top Cat that he is, in fact, a cat, which Griswald believes due to his gullible nature. His speech pattern is usually minimal with occasional giggling,[1]but he is capable of speaking like a regular human.[2]

characters.name: Honeydew Mellon
characters.description: Honeydew Mellonis a character inTop Cat.  She was voiced bySallie Jones. Honeydew is a classy showgirl with whomBennywas briefly infatuated. However she was part of a gang of con-artists who wanted nothing more than to separate Benny from his money. She is a tall, thin, pink cat with almond-shaped eyes and a white, raindrop shaped muzzle. She does not have any whiskers, and has a curly tuft of fur on the top of her head and on the sides. She wears what seems to be a red pearl necklace, with a matching dress. Seemingly sweet and charming, she is excellent at schmoozing her soon-to-be victims with her manipulation tactics. She will lie and cheat and steal, and does not seem to regret it.

characters.name: Jazz
characters.description: A. T. Jazzis a character inTop Cat.  He was voiced byDaws Butler. Jazz is a cat with bronze fur and a long, crooked tail. His head shape is similar toSpook's, with one strand of fur directed downward on each cheek. He wears a blue newsboy cap and a tan trenchcoat and usually has a smug grin on his face. Much like Top Cat, Jazz is a clever and conniving yet lazy cat. Upon arriving toHoagy's Alleyin his debut episode, he successfully persuades the gang, excluding Benny, to be on his side and one-ups T.C. at every opportunity. He and Top Cat have great rivalry, with the two having a battle of wits and schemes in the episode.

characters.name: Kitty Glitter
characters.description: Kitty Glitteris a character inTop Cat and the Beverly Hills Cats.  She was voiced byTeresa Ganzel. Kitty is a cream-colored cat with a white muzzle. Kitty happens to be one of the few feline characters that doesn't have any whiskers, if not the only one. She also has a long tail like many of the other feline characters, though it doesn't appear in most of her earlier scenes. Her natural hair is short and brown, however she wears a wig for most of the movie. She was unknowingly set up on a blind date with TC in order to distract him from Benny.  When out with Brain, mistaking him for TC, and in the photo given to TC, she is wearing a blonde wig, however by the time she actually meets up with TC at the costume party, the wig she is wearing is of a much redder color.

When out with Brain, mistaking him for TC, and in the photo given to TC, she is wearing a blonde wig, however by the time she actually meets up with TC at the costume party, the wig she is wearing is of a much redder color.

characters.name: Lazlo-Lazlo
characters.description: Lazlo-Lazlois a character inTop CatandTop Cat: the Movie.  He was voiced byLeo De Lyonin the original series. He is a violinist who recorded one album, then disappeared. WhenOfficer Dibblebought a record by him and played it, the musical director of Carnegie Hall heard it and mistakenly thought it wasBennyplaying. He offered Benny a job for his talent before realizing that it wasn't Benny. Top Cat had told a street sweeper to "Stick to[his]broom" when he had tried to explain that he was Lazlo-Lazlo. He still cleans up after every show. Top Cat and Benny saw him again in when theMaharajah of Pookajeecame to watch him perform. Lazlo-Lazlo is a finely dressed man with pale skin, and bright shaggy red hair. His nose is long and sharp and under his nose he possesses a thin black mustache that is quite finely trimmed and styled. His eyebrows match his mustache in color. When doing his janitorial work he wears an all white suit, a matching hat, and a white scarf. When he performs on stage, he is in a navy blue suit with an orange tie.

Lazlo-Lazlo is a finely dressed man with pale skin, and bright shaggy red hair. His nose is long and sharp and under his nose he possesses a thin black mustache that is quite finely trimmed and styled. His eyebrows match his mustache in color. When doing his janitorial work he wears an all white suit, a matching hat, and a white scarf. When he performs on stage, he is in a navy blue suit with an orange tie.
